settings.heading: Find the right download fast
settings.copy: Browse drivers, utilities, and update files by product and platform without bouncing between pages.
settings.support_note: Use downloads when a file is the clearest next step. If the right file still is not obvious, check compatibility or get help now.

settings.heading: Downloadable resources in one place
settings.copy: See more files at once so it is easier to choose the right download for the job in front of you.
settings.source_note: Start with product and platform. If the right file still is not obvious, check compatibility or get help now.

settings.heading: Not sure which download fits?
settings.copy: Move straight to compatibility or a support request before you install anything.
